summary: Comprehensive testing of GPGT enhancements: Cart/Login text labels, Admin Notifications system, Quotation Mode banner, and Checkout form improvements. All 10 backend API tests passed. All 8 frontend features verified working correctly.

backend: GET /api/notifications returns notifications list and unread_count (200)
PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read marks all as read and sets unread_count to 0
Notifications have all required fields: id, type, title, message, read, created_at
frontend: Cart text visible next to cart icon in header
Login text visible next to login icon when not logged in
Admin notification bell icon visible with unread count badge
Notification dropdown shows list with 'Mark all read' button
Notifications show different icons for new_user, new_order, new_enquiry types
Quotation Mode Active banner visible on admin dashboard when show_prices=false
Checkout form has +971 default for mobile number field
Checkout form has all required fields marked with * (Full Name, Email, Mobile Number, Address, City, Emirate)

critical_code_review_comments: Notifications system implemented correctly with proper admin authentication
Notification creation hooks properly integrated in registration, order, and enquiry flows
AdminLayout polls notifications every 30 seconds for real-time updates
ERPDashboard shows Quotation Mode banner when show_prices is false
Checkout form correctly initializes phone with +971 prefix
All required fields properly marked with asterisks in checkout form
seed_data_creation: Test users and enquiries created during notification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GPGT Platform enhancements fully tested: 1) Header shows Cart and Login text labels next to icons when not logged in. 2) Admin notifications bell icon shows unread count and dropdown with notification types (new_user, new_order, new_enquiry). 3) Quotation Mode banner appears on admin dashboard when show_prices=false. 4) Checkout form has +971 default for mobile and all mandatory fields marked with *. All backend notification APIs working: GET /api/notifications, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read, PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read.

features_verified.notification_api_mark_read: PASS - PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read marks notification as read
features_verified.notification_api_mark_all_read: PASS - PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read marks all as read
features_verified.quotation_mode_banner: PASS - 'Quotation Mode Active' banner shows on dashboard when show_prices=false
features_verified.checkout_phone_default: PASS - Mobile number field defaults to '+971'
features_verified.checkout_required_fields: PASS - All required fields marked with * (Full Name, Email, Mobile Number, Address, City, Emirate)
